dimensions.note: No credential/secret path touched. The scan_error change reads an error object's string `.message`; scan_error messages are already operator-facing diagnostics, never token material, and AWS SDK credential resolution is unchanged.
No logging code changed. For real Error inputs the classified message is byte-identical; the change only recovers a usable message from non-Error object errors instead of "[object Object]".

This IS the change: classifyError/collectHaystack now extract a string `.message` from non-Error object errors and object-shaped causes, so an object whose signal lives only in `.message` classifies correctly (network/auth_expired/access_denied) instead of falling to "other" with an "[object Object]" message. Error and string inputs behave byte-identically (extractMessage falls back to String(err) on a missing/non-string message); verified against _lib/scan_error_test.ts. Still throws before writeResource.

_lib/scan_error_test.ts gains two teeth tests — a non-Error object with the signal only in `.message` => access_denied + exact message, and an object cause with a network signature only in `.message` => network — both fail if the source change is reverted. All prior scan_error tests unchanged and green.
Read-only fan-out scan unchanged; a pure message-extraction helper change cannot affect re-runnability.
No SDK calls or request shapes changed; the scan_error kind enum and stored row shape are untouched.
No clients, handles, or files are affected by a pure classification helper change.

The only source change is the regenerated shared _lib/scan_error.ts twin (message-extraction hardening); no README/fixture identifiers added or changed. Manifest and model.version aligned at 2026.07.20.0.
ScanErrorSchema and all resource schemas are untouched strict z.object; the change is confined to the classifyError/collectHaystack pure functions.
No resource/file spec lifetime or garbageCollection touched by this change.
Read-only fan-out scan (Describe*/Get* only); no create/update/delete lifecycle to complete. Unaffected by a classification helper change.
The SSO pre-flight and profile-suffix refusal are unchanged in code; unaffected by the scan_error helper change.
scanErrorKey and all instance-name construction are unchanged.
No readResource/writeResource paths changed; the stored scan_error row shape is byte-identical.

model.version bumped to 2026.07.20.0 with a matching no-op upgrade entry appended (identity upgradeAttributes; description records the regenerated shared scan_error twin, no globalArguments schema changes). The upgrades-tail toVersion equals model.version, verified by the passing metadata test.
